name: Linear
description: Linear project management integration for OpenClaw

apiKey.description: Linear API key (Settings > API > Personal API keys)

webhookSecret.description: Webhook signing secret for HMAC verification

teamIds.description: Linear team keys to listen for (e.g. ["ENG", "OPS"]). Empty = all teams.

eventFilter.description: Event types to handle (e.g. ["Issue", "Comment"]). Empty = all types.

agentMapping.description: Map Linear user IDs to OpenClaw agent IDs for routing (e.g. {"linear-user-uuid": "agent-name"})
